programme.desc: Bert falls for Lisa and builds unrealistic expectations. As he navigates his feelings, he learns that relationships require honesty and patience rather than fantasy and assumptions.

programme.title: The Raccoons
programme.desc: A magician visits Evergreen, inspiring Bert to become an apprentice. Meanwhile, Cyril promotes his vault. As illusions and reality mix, both pursuits lead to unexpected and chaotic results.

programme.title: The Raccoons
programme.desc: Bentley visits and joins Bert and Cedric at their old school, which faces closure. Together, they must find a way to save it and preserve its legacy before it disappears for good.

programme.title: The Raccoons
programme.desc: Cyril pushes himself to impress Cedric with a science project, going too far. Meanwhile, Bert discovers fossils. Both stories highlight the balance between ambition and responsibility.

programme.title: The Raccoons
programme.desc: One of the pigs turns to theft to impress others, while Cyril and Knox compete in business. The situation spirals until lessons about honesty and self-worth come to light.

programme.title: The Raccoons
programme.desc: While staging a play, Cyril believes his theater is haunted. Strange events cause panic, but the truth behind the “ghost” reveals a more grounded explanation.

programme.title: The Raccoons
programme.desc: The pigs hire a reporter to expose Cyril, while Bert reflects on past adventures. As secrets surface, Cyril’s reputation hangs in the balance amid growing tension.

programme.title: The Raccoons
programme.desc: Cyril pursues a romance that quickly becomes complicated. Meanwhile, Bert and Cedric face fears during skydiving, learning to overcome anxiety in different ways.

programme.title: The Raccoons
programme.desc: Cyril is hospitalized, leaving the pigs in charge of a major deal. Chaos ensues, while Bert tries to recover money from a bad purchase, leading to parallel struggles with responsibility.

programme.title: The Raccoons
programme.desc: Ralph’s family moves to Evergreen, bringing change and adjustment challenges. Meanwhile, the pigs take new jobs, leading to humorous clashes as everyone adapts to new roles.

programme.title: The Raccoons
programme.desc: Cyril assigns Cedric to develop a new product, leading to unexpected discoveries. Meanwhile, a mysterious garbage train raises questions the gang must investigate.

programme.title: The Raccoons
programme.desc: Bentley tries to repay a debt through a risky scheme that traps him and the pigs in caverns. Bert and others must rescue them, learning that shortcuts often lead to bigger problems.

programme.title: The Raccoons
programme.desc: Bentley excels at work and earns a promotion, angering the pigs. Their sabotage backfires, and Cyril must fix the situation while recognizing Bentley’s true value.

programme.title: The Raccoons
programme.desc: Bert overcommits while preparing for a fair, trying to please everyone. Meanwhile, the pigs run another scheme. Both storylines show the cost of taking on too much.

programme.title: The Raccoons
programme.desc: Bentley learns martial arts but faces challenges with discipline and trust. His mentor’s past complicates things, forcing Bentley to prove his dedication.

programme.title: The Raccoons
programme.desc: Cyril launches a satellite service, while a mishap traps Broo inside it. A race against time ensues as the gang works to bring him back safely.

programme.title: The Raccoons
programme.desc: Lisa faces peer pressure, while Cyril tries to join an elite club. Both confront issues of identity and acceptance, learning to stay true to themselves.

programme.title: The Raccoons
programme.desc: Bert runs against Cyril for mayor, leading to a spirited campaign. Their clash highlights differing visions for the forest and tests their leadership.

programme.title: The Raccoons
programme.desc: The pigs take on a risky side job involving toxic drums that end up in the forest’s water. The gang must act quickly to prevent environmental disaster.

programme.title: The Raccoons
programme.desc: In the finale, Cyril retires and Cedric takes over, but a con artist manipulates him into a risky scheme. Bert and Lisa step in to help, leading to a final showdown about trust and responsibility.

programme.title: The Raccoons
programme.desc: Bert, Ralph, Melissa, and the gang secretly plan a surprise for Cyril Sneer. When Cyril notices odd behavior, he grows paranoid and believes the Raccoons are plotting against him, leading him to take drastic and ridiculous measures to defend himself.

programme.title: The Raccoons
programme.desc: Bert sets out to climb Evergreen Mountain alone to prove his independence. Meanwhile, Cyril Sneer plots to stop him to keep a hidden family secret safe. As Bert faces danger and doubt, he must rely on courage and determination to succeed.

programme.title: The Raccoons
programme.desc: Bert and Ralph take Cedric camping at their childhood fort, but to join their club, Cedric must spend the night in a haunted house alone. As fear sets in, Cedric discovers inner bravery while the others anxiously wait to see if he succeeds.

programme.title: The Raccoons
programme.desc: Cyril and Mammoth Motors plan to build a factory that will harm the forest. To stop him, Bert and his friends create a solar-powered car to race against Cyril’s Sneermobile, with the future of Evergreen Forest depending on the outcome.

programme.title: The Raccoons
programme.desc: Feeling unappreciated, Cedric runs away and stays with the Raccoons. At the same time, Julie and Tommy run away but become lost in the forest. The gang must find them quickly while helping Cedric deal with his feelings about his father.

programme.title: The Raccoons
programme.desc: Bert, Cedric, and Broo discover a treasure map and begin searching the forest for hidden riches. When Cyril learns of their quest, he schemes to claim the treasure for himself, turning the search into a race filled with tricks and surprises.

programme.title: The Raccoons
programme.desc: Ralph and Cedric become trapped in Cyril Sneer’s new vault, which is filled with dangerous traps. Bert, Melissa, and Broo attempt a daring rescue, and even Cyril must help as they work together to escape before it is too late.

programme.title: The Raccoons
programme.desc: Ralph receives a job offer in the city, and Ranger Dan is given a similar chance. Bert worries the group will split apart and be unable to stop Cyril’s plans, forcing everyone to decide whether to follow opportunity or stay together.

programme.title: The Raccoons
programme.desc: After telling too many wild stories, Bert is no longer believed when he discovers Cyril plans to pave the forest into a parking lot. With no one trusting him, Bert must find proof quickly before Cyril carries out his destructive plan.

programme.title: The Raccoons
programme.desc: When Cedric and Sophia hear that royalty will visit Evergreen Forest, Bert dreams of becoming a knight. Meanwhile, Cyril wants knighthood for power, leading both into humorous efforts to impress the royal visitors during their stay.

programme.title: The Raccoons
programme.desc: Cyril schemes to buy the Evergreen Standard by cutting off its supplies with help from Mr. Knox, who demands payment in gold. Bert tries to save the paper by finding a way to secure resources, leading to a risky plan to outsmart Cyril.

programme.title: The Raccoons
programme.desc: A pro baseball team visits Evergreen Forest and seeks a new player. Bert and Cedric both compete for the spot, straining their friendship as rivalry grows. In the end, they must decide what matters more, success or their bond.

programme.title: The Raccoons
programme.desc: Cyril offers Bert a deal to become the face of his new cologne line. Tempted by fame and money, Bert considers the offer, but soon realizes the cost of endorsing Cyril’s schemes and must choose between integrity and success.

programme.title: The Raccoons
programme.desc: Cyril panics when his betrayed partner Karl Snarl returns for revenge. Meanwhile, Bert discovers an old helicopter, and Melissa must overcome her fear of heights to help save her friends during a dangerous confrontation.

programme.title: Storage Hunters
programme.desc: Competition boils over when bitter rivals Brandon and Jesse throw down over a storage unit containing an amazing movie monster and a potential hundred thousand dollar payout.

programme.title: Storage Hunters
programme.desc: Brandon and Lori go to war over a record producer's storage unit and unearth what could be a priceless piece of rock and roll history. Then, Jesse one ups the competition for a locker with a multi-thousand dollar payout.

programme.title: Storage Hunters
programme.desc: Brandon and Lori look to cash in on their first big trip to New Orleans, but the locals are hungering for a fight. Then, the Taylor Brothers wage war to win a locker loaded with hunting and sporting equipment.

programme.title: Storage Hunters
programme.desc: Back on the bayou, the buyers are ready to crack open the abandoned lockers and throw down some serious cash. Local legend FJ sees big dollar signs in old voodoo artifacts. Brandon and Lori unearth a rare find with a potentially priceless payout.

programme.title: Storage Hunters
programme.desc: The buyers press their luck in Sin City where Brandon and Lori get outfoxed by a group of locals with a questionable strategy. Then, Jesse gambles on a locker filled with junk. Everyone thinks he's crazy, but he knows something they don't.

programme.title: Storage Hunters
programme.desc: Jesse taunts Brandon and Lori in the hopes of instigating a fight and later unearths a ticking treasure. Then, seasoned local Victor throws down his bankroll for a trove of luxury goods, but are they actually knock-offs?

programme.title: Storage Hunters
programme.desc: Brandon and Lori return to Boston and square off against his former protégé Wade. The bad blood may just erupt into a full-out brawl on the auction floor. A former military hero goes all in on a locker that turns out to be hiding the ultimate score.

programme.title: Storage Hunters
programme.desc: The score of a lifetime is hidden in the back of what already appears to be a great locker, but when the bidding heats up, will our auction heroes have the cash to stay in this game?

programme.title: Storage Hunters
programme.desc: Old rivals unite when Brandon and Jesse are faced with the unthinkable: join forces or stand alone to gamble on a once-in-a-lifetime locker.

programme.title: Storage Hunters
programme.desc: The competition heats up as Brandon and Lori find themselves in an all out bidding war with the tough-talking Taylor brothers. Amidst the chaos, Jesse goes all-in for a locker that could be hiding an expert marksman's rare weapons.

programme.title: Storage Hunters
programme.desc: Our buyers go to war to win a locker packed with valuable vintage surf gear.

programme.title: Storage Hunters
programme.desc: Our buyers throw down to score a locker packed with rare movie memorabilia. Then, Papa Bear and T-Money each scoop up low-grade bins, but when they each start to sift through their individual messes, one of them finds a childhood dream-come-true.

programme.title: Storage Hunters
programme.desc: Our buyers lock horns to win a unit packed with valuable construction equipment. Then, Brandon and Lori spot something that no one else does, but they'll have to play it cool if they want to walk away with this golden score.

programme.title: Storage Hunters
programme.desc: Minds are blown when two of our buyers team up for a major score. It's an unlikely pair that, together, could make a pile of cash.

programme.title: Storage Hunters
programme.desc: Jesse and Brandon get in a spirited bidding war after one of them spots a hidden treasure; a savvy newbie enters the fray and steals a prize from the regulars; and Lori and Brandon lock into a hot-ticket item that could net them a small fortune.

programme.title: Storage Hunters
programme.desc: Our Buyers bid big to win a locker packed with what looks like rare art, but will the winner walk away with cash or counterfeits?

programme.title: Storage Hunters
programme.desc: Our buyer go head-to-head to score an item that appears to be a covered car. But when the tarp is pulled back, will the winner drive away with a pile of cash or a piece of trash?

programme.title: Storage Hunters
programme.desc: Bids on a covered car are driven up; Dan dings Jesse for a locker loaded with pricey tools, but the latter bounces back for a big score; and the day's final auction gets everyone intensely involved, perhaps too intensely for one.

programme.title: Storage Hunters
programme.desc: A locker full of fishing gear spearheads a bidding war that leaves the winner with a quite a catch; Lori has a run-in with a bidder over a unit; Papa Bear pays a hefty price for a locker that turns out to include some not-quite-street-legal items.

programme.title: Storage Hunters
programme.desc: Our buyers throw down to win a locker packed with recreational equipment and what looks like a hidden tractor. But when the dust settles, and the cover's pulled back, one lucky hunter gets the surprise of a lifetime.

programme.title: Storage Hunters
programme.desc: Our buyers are in for the fight of their lives as they lock horns at the nation's biggest shipping container auction.

programme.title: Storage Hunters
programme.desc: A new couple, Scott and Chrissy, force their way onto Brandon and Lori’s turf. A set of wrapped pallets challenges even the most experienced buyers—does the plastic sheeting cover up garbage... or gold?

programme.title: Storage Hunters
programme.desc: Jesse knows you don’t strike it big if you play it safe, so he gambles on a safe he hopes will pay off big time. Then, Lori’s fiery bid on a lackluster unit brings out a dragon’s roar from Brandon.

programme.title: Storage Hunters
programme.desc: A deathly bin sends buyers spinning and throws everybody on edge. Then, Brandon and Lori square off against Scott and Chrissy with explosive attacks and counter-attacks. Emotion, rather than strategy, threatens to rule the day.

programme.title: Storage Hunters
programme.desc: Arch enemies Brandon and Jesse drop their guard to team up against a new threat. Then, it’s back to the future when Desert Dan risks all on a tire and a hunch.

programme.title: Storage Hunters
programme.desc: The potential for big money brings out fierce competition at this rare high stakes RV auction, and Brandon and Lori are determined to keep Scott and Chrissy from walking away with a score.

programme.title: Storage Hunters
programme.desc: A strange obsession and a peepshow surprise our bidders, and a sinister swarm scares some of them off -- but do the birds know where the money lies? Jesse starts an all-out blind bid battle, betting on a unit without ever seeing the inside.

programme.title: Storage Hunters
programme.desc: Brandon and Scott ignore their wives’ advice and bid hard against each other for a bowling bin— but did the winner throw a gutter ball, or a lucky strike? T Money is determined to hit the jackpot on a bin with an ATM, but is it worth the gamble?

programme.title: Storage Hunters
programme.desc: The heat is on in Vegas where Scott, Brandon and Lori have come to see if they can strike it rich... and not just in the casinos. And guess who’s back? In this boom or bust town, the chance for a big score has also lured Brandon’s nemesis.

programme.title: Storage Hunters
programme.desc: Dustin Taylor emerges from the Mississippi swamps to renew his challenge against Brandon and Lori in Vegas. The fight is on, but a mystery bin’s magic might keep Dustin in check.
programme.sub-title: Now You See It Now You Don't

programme.title: Storage Hunters
programme.desc: A rumor that Sean will be auctioning vehicles draws buyers out to the foothills -- but the real content of these containers is anybody’s guess. Brandon and Lori try to beat back the competition on a container that might hold antiques.

programme.title: Storage Hunters
programme.desc: Jesse, Brandon, and Lori are determined to play each other for a unit full of cinder blocks...and maybe much more. A swarm of bees throws the auction into chaos—Brandon’s life is at stake due to his allergy to bees.

programme.title: Storage Hunters
programme.desc: The first bin of the day gives new meaning to the phrase “business in a box.” The door opens to reveal… another door! It’s an actual storefront that conceals all the contents of the bin.

programme.title: Storage Hunters
programme.desc: The competition is in full flight as our hunters battle for rare finds at an airport auction. Everything is up for grabs – from expensive goodies left in the lost and found… to abandoned luggage and air cargo containers…

programme.title: Storage Hunters
programme.desc: With Sean as the captain, the biggest of the big-time bidders head to Marina Del Rey in search of true nautical treasures. In one of the most explosive episodes to date, Scott and Brandon test each others jibs.

programme.title: Storage Hunters
programme.desc: Old rivals come out smokin’ in an attempt to uncover some unique finds. When Jesse tries to bump off Brandon and Lori, will he score high or strike out?

programme.title: Storage Hunters
programme.desc: Scott shoots the moon on a bin that may cost him an arm and a leg. Then, T-Money spies a prize that could send him straight to the top. Plus, Brandon and Jesse lock horns in a do or die bidding war that could send one of them to the retirement home.

programme.title: Storage Hunters
programme.desc: T Money puts his honesty to the test with shocking revelations. Jesse finds a loser bin that could make him a winner. Brandon and Lori think they see treasure in a unlikely place.

programme.title: Storage Hunters
programme.desc: Things get hairy for the hunters as some ring in the money while others go for broke. Desert Dan returns to turn up the heat as T Money continues to march to the beat of his own drum.
